name: @tootallnate/fsb5
description: Parser + decoder for FMOD Sample Banks (FSB5 format). Walks the header + sample table + name table, exposes each sample with codec metadata, and decodes PCM/IMA-ADPCM samples to WAV plus Vorbis samples to Ogg-Vorbis using a CRC32-keyed setup-packet lookup table.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
